'''thafono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylogenesis|xylogenesis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-f-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylogenesis|xylogenesis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thafono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæfeneth|thæfeneth]] || [[word:thæfenej|thæfenej]] || [[word:thæfenesh|thæfenesh]] || [[word:thæfene|thæfene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thafofonoth|thafofonoth]] || [[word:thafofonoj|thafofonoj]] || [[word:thafofonosh|thafofonosh]] || [[word:thafofono|thafofono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafonoth|thafonoth]] || [[word:thafonoj|thafonoj]] || [[word:thafonosh|thafonosh]] || [[word:thafono|thafono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafofnofth|thafofnofth]] || [[word:thafofnofj|thafofnofj]] || [[word:thafofnofsh|thafofnofsh]] || [[word:thafofnof|thafofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thafonotho|thafonotho]] || [[word:thafonojo|thafonojo]] || [[word:thafonosho|thafonosho]] || [[word:thafonoko|thafonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thafonoth|thafonoth]] || [[word:thafonoj|thafonoj]] || [[word:thafonosh|thafonosh]] || [[word:thafono|thafono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thafonothol|thafonothol]] || [[word:thafonojol|thafonojol]] || [[word:thafonoshol|thafonoshol]] || [[word:thafonokol|thafonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thafonoothotho|thafonoothotho]] || [[word:thafonoojojo|thafonoojojo]] || [[word:thafonooshosho|thafonooshosho]] || [[word:thafonooko|thafonooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thafonothon|thafonothon]] || [[word:thafonojon|thafonojon]] || [[word:thafonoshon|thafonoshon]] || [[word:thafonokon|thafonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thafonothooro|thafonothooro]] || [[word:thafonojooro|thafonojooro]] || [[word:thafonoshooro|thafonoshooro]] || [[word:thafonokooro|thafonokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
